mapper.select:
SELECT n.ROUTE_NODE_ID, n.PLANT_CD, n.NODE_CD, n.NODE_NM, n.NODE_TYPE, n.LOCATION_ID, n.USE_YN, n.REG_USER_ID, n.REG_DTM, n.UPD_USER_ID, n.UPD_DTM, p.PLANT_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, c.COM_NM AS NODE_TYPE_NM FROM MCS_ROUTE_NODE n INNER JOIN MST_PLANT p ON n.PLANT_CD = p.PLANT_CD LEFT JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON n.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID LEFT JOIN COM_CODE c ON c.GRP_CD = 'MCS_NODE_TYPE' AND n.NODE_TYPE = c.COM_CD
AND n.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND n.NODE_CD LIKE CONCAT('%', #{nodeCd}, '%')
ORDER BY n.PLANT_CD, n.NODE_CD

SELECT e.ROUTE_EDGE_ID, e.PLANT_CD, e.EDGE_CD, e.EDGE_NM, e.FROM_NODE_ID, e.TO_NODE_ID, e.BIDIRECTIONAL_YN, e.DISTANCE_M, e.TRAVEL_TIME_SEC, e.BASE_COST, e.EDGE_STATUS, e.USE_YN, e.REG_USER_ID, e.REG_DTM, e.UPD_USER_ID, e.UPD_DTM, fn.NODE_CD AS FROM_NODE_CD, fn.NODE_NM AS FROM_NODE_NM, tn.NODE_CD AS TO_NODE_CD, tn.NODE_NM AS TO_NODE_NM, NULL AS EDGE_STATUS_NM FROM MCS_ROUTE_EDGE e INNER JOIN MCS_ROUTE_NODE fn ON e.FROM_NODE_ID = fn.ROUTE_NODE_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ROUTE_NODE tn ON e.TO_NODE_ID = tn.ROUTE_NODE_ID WHERE e.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND e.USE_YN = 'Y' AND fn.USE_YN = 'Y' AND tn.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT n.ROUTE_NODE_ID, n.PLANT_CD, n.NODE_CD, n.NODE_NM, n.NODE_TYPE, n.LOCATION_ID, n.USE_YN, n.REG_USER_ID, n.REG_DTM, n.UPD_USER_ID, n.UPD_DTM, NULL AS PLANT_NM, l.LOCATION_CD, l.LOCATION_NM, NULL AS NODE_TYPE_NM FROM MCS_ROUTE_NODE n LEFT JOIN MCS_LOCATION l ON n.LOCATION_ID = l.LOCATION_ID WHERE n.PLANT_CD = #{plantCd} AND n.LOCATION_ID = #{locationId} AND n.USE_YN = 'Y'

SELECT TRANSFER_ROUTE_ID, TRANSFER_ID, ROUTE_STATUS, TOTAL_DISTANCE_M, TOTAL_TIME_SEC, TOTAL_COST, OPTIMIZE_RULE, REPLAN_COUNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM, UPD_USER_ID, UPD_DTM, NULL AS STEPS FROM MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE WHERE TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId}

SELECT s.ROUTE_STEP_ID, s.TRANSFER_ROUTE_ID, s.STEP_SEQ, s.ROUTE_EDGE_ID, s.FROM_NODE_ID, s.TO_NODE_ID, s.STEP_STATUS, s.EXPECTED_TIME_SEC, e.EDGE_CD, e.EDGE_NM, fn.NODE_CD AS FROM_NODE_CD, fn.NODE_NM AS FROM_NODE_NM, tn.NODE_CD AS TO_NODE_CD, tn.NODE_NM AS TO_NODE_NM, e.EDGE_STATUS FROM MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE_STEP s INNER JOIN MCS_ROUTE_EDGE e ON s.ROUTE_EDGE_ID = e.ROUTE_EDGE_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ROUTE_NODE fn ON s.FROM_NODE_ID = fn.ROUTE_NODE_ID INNER JOIN MCS_ROUTE_NODE tn ON s.TO_NODE_ID = tn.ROUTE_NODE_ID WHERE s.TRANSFER_ROUTE_ID = #{transferRouteId} ORDER BY s.STEP_SEQ
mapper.delete: DELETE s FROM MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE_STEP s INNER JOIN MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE r ON s.TRANSFER_ROUTE_ID = r.TRANSFER_ROUTE_ID WHERE r.TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE ( TRANSFER_ID, ROUTE_STATUS, TOTAL_DISTANCE_M, TOTAL_TIME_SEC, TOTAL_COST, OPTIMIZE_RULE, REPLAN_COUNT, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{transferId}, #{routeStatus}, #{totalDistanceM}, #{totalTimeSec}, #{totalCost}, #{optimizeRule}, #{replanCount}, #{regUserId}, NOW() )

INSERT INTO MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE_STEP ( TRANSFER_ROUTE_ID, STEP_SEQ, ROUTE_EDGE_ID, FROM_NODE_ID, TO_NODE_ID, STEP_STATUS, EXPECTED_TIME_SEC, REG_USER_ID, REG_DTM ) VALUES ( #{transferRouteId}, #{stepSeq}, #{routeEdgeId}, #{fromNodeId}, #{toNodeId}, #{stepStatus}, #{expectedTimeSec}, 'SYSTEM', NOW() )
mapper.update: UPDATE MCS_TRANSFER_ROUTE SET ROUTE_STATUS = #{routeStatus}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE TRANSFER_ID = #{transferId}
UPDATE MCS_ROUTE_EDGE SET EDGE_STATUS = #{edgeStatus}, UPD_USER_ID = #{updUserId}, UPD_DTM = NOW() WHERE ROUTE_EDGE_ID = #{routeEdgeId}
